# NFS-e (FocusNFE)

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:ce3915bc0a98211bf16ff1bd676aec104c8872071972980fa7b44f1c1eb6aad4
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Esse módulo integra a emissão de Notas Fiscais de Serviços(NFSe) com a API da FocusNFE permitindo assim, a criação, transmissão, consulta e cancelamento de documentos fiscais do tipo NFSe.

Para mais informações, acesse: <https://focusnfe.com.br/>

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

Para instalar esta funcionalidde, simplesmente instale o módulo e faça as devidas configurações.

## Configuration

Após a instalação do módulo, siga os seguintes passos para configurá-lo para a empresa desejada:

1. Definições > Usuários & Empresas > Empresas

2. Selecione a empresa desejada

3. Na visualização da empresa, clique na aba Fiscal

4. Na subseção NFS-e, configure os seguintes campos:

   > - **Ambiente NFS-e:** Selecione a opção a ser usada no ambiente (Produção, Homologação)
   > - **Provedor NFS-e:** Selecione a opção FocusNFE
   > - **FocusNFe Token:** Informe o token de acesso da empresa. Obs. Este token é obtido através da plataforma da FocusNFE
   > - **Valor Tipo de Serviço:** Se necessário configure o campo que deve preencher o valor de tipo de serviço
   > - **Valor Código CNAE:** Se necessário configure o campo que deve preencher o valor do Código CNAE

## Usage

Para usar este módulo:

1. Crie uma fatura com o tipo de documento fiscal 'SE'.
2. Preencha os detalhes necessários, como o código tributário da cidade, impostos e informações correlatas.
3. Valide o documento.
4. Envie o Documento Fiscal.
5. Acompanhe o status de processamento do documento.

In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.res_company.ResCompany.get_focusnfe_token
documentation:
Retrieve the appropriate FocusNFe API token based on the current NFSe
environment setting.
Decide between the production and homologation (test) environment tokens by
examining the 'nfse_environment' field of the record.

Precondition:
- Call this method on a single record only. The method uses ensure_one to
enforce this rule.

Returns:
- str: The FocusNFe token. Return the production token if 'nfse_environment'
is set to "1"; otherwise, return the homologation token.

Raises:
- ValueError: If the method is called on a recordset containing more than one
record.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._make_focus_nfse_http_request
documentation:
Perform a generic HTTP request.

Args:
    method (str): The HTTP method to use (e.g., 'GET', 'POST').
    url (str): The URL to which the request is sent.
    token (str): The authentication token for the service.
    data (dict, optional): The payload to send in the request body.
        Defaults to None.
    params (dict, optional): The URL parameters to append to the URL.
        Defaults to None.

Returns:
    requests.Response: The response object from the requests library.

Raises:
    UserError: If the HTTP request fails with a 4xx/5xx response.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._identify_service_recipient
documentation:
Identify whether the service recipient is a CPF or CNPJ.

Args:
    recipient (dict): A dictionary containing either 'cpf' or 'cnpj' keys.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary with either a 'cpf' or 'cnpj' key and its value.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse.process_focus_nfse_document
documentation:
Process the electronic fiscal document.

Args:
    edoc (tuple): The electronic document data.
    ref (str): The document reference.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:
    requests.Response: The response from the NFSe service.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._prepare_payload
documentation:
Construct the NFSe payload.

Args:
    rps (dict): Information about the RPS.
    service (dict): Details of the service provided.
    recipient (dict): Information about the service recipient.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:
    dict: The complete payload for the NFSe request.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._prepare_provider_data
documentation:
Construct the provider section of the payload.

Args:
    rps (dict): Information about the RPS.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:
    dict: The provider section of the payload.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._prepare_service_data
documentation:
Construct the service section of the payload.

Args:
    service (dict): Details of the service provided.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:
    dict: The service section of the payload.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.FocusnfeNfse._prepare_recipient_data
documentation:
Construct the recipient section of the payload.

Args:
    recipient (dict): Information about the service recipient.
    identification (dict): The recipient's identification (CPF or CNPJ).

Returns:
    dict: The recipient section of the payload.

documentation:
Query NFSe by RPS.

Args:

    complete (bool): Whether to return complete information.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:

documentation:
Cancel an electronic fiscal document.

Args:

    cancel_reason (str): The reason for cancellation.
    company (recordset): The company record.

Returns:

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document.make_focus_nfse_pdf
documentation:
Generate a PDF for a NFSe document using Focus NFSe service.

Parameters:
    - content: The binary content of the PDF to be attached.

Returns:
    None. Creates or updates an 'ir.attachment' record with the PDF content.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._serialize
documentation:
Serialize electronic documents (edocs) for sending to the NFSe provider.

Parameters:

Returns:

    NFSe-specific information.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._document_export
documentation:
Prepare and export the document's electronic information.

Parameters:

    formatted for readability.

Returns:
    The result of the document export operation.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._document_status

Check and update the status of the NFSe document.

Parameters:

Returns:

Cancel a NFSe document with the Focus NFSe provider.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._eletronic_document_send

Send the electronic document to the NFSe provider.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._exec_before_SITUACAO_EDOC_CANCELADA

Hook method before changing document's state to 'Cancelled'.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_nfse_focus.models.document.Document._cron_document_status_focus
